title: Lovely Baked Chinese Mustard Seeds Bake
description: A festive and flavorful Sichuan dish featuring mustard seeds, this lacto-vegetarian friendly bake is perfect for any occasion, with a funky and bouncy texture from the wood-fired baking process.

ingredients.name: Chinese mustard seeds
ingredients.notes: black or brown seeds work well

instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and vegetable oil.
In a large bowl, combine Chinese mustard seeds, toasted Sichuan peppercorns, grated ginger, and minced garlic.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the mustard seed mixture.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the tofu and toss to coat.
Transfer the tofu mixture to a baking dish and top with chopped scallions and wood-fired baked bread crumbs.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional scallions and Sichuan peppercorns if desired.
